auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Manatal API token used with the Authorization: Token <apiKey> header. Manatal says Open API tokens are obtained from its support team: https://developers.manatal.com/reference/getting-started.

actions.name: create_candidate
actions.description: Create a Manatal candidate using JSON-safe profile fields.

externalId.description: ID of the candidate in an external system.

owner.description: ID of the owner of the candidate.

sourceOther.description: Manual source information when sourceType is other.

consent.description: Whether the candidate gave permission to use their data.

gender.description: Gender value stored on the candidate.

zipcode.description: Postal code for the candidate address.

latestDegree.description: Latest degree obtained by the candidate.

latestUniversity.description: Latest university the candidate graduated from.

currentCompany.description: Company where the candidate currently works.

currentDepartment.description: Department where the candidate currently works.

customFields.description: Custom field values defined in Manatal.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Manatal candidate.

actions.name: create_job
actions.description: Create a Manatal job using JSON-safe job fields.

organization.description: ID of the organization the job is assigned to.

externalId.description: ID of the job in an external system.

expectedCloseAt.description: Expected date and time when the job will be closed or filled.

headcount.description: Number of people to be hired for the job.

salaryMin.description: Minimum salary value for the job.

salaryMax.description: Maximum salary value for the job.

isSalaryVisible.description: Whether salary information is displayed to candidates.

industry.description: ID of the industry assigned to the job.

owner.description: ID of the owner of the job.

address.description: Address of the office where the job takes place.

city.description: City of the office where the job takes place.

state.description: State of the office where the job takes place.

country.description: Country of the office where the job takes place.

zipcode.description: Postal code for the job address.

isPinnedInCareerPage.description: Whether the job is pinned on the career page.

customFields.description: Custom field values defined in Manatal.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Manatal job.

actions.name: create_match
actions.description: Create a Manatal candidate-job match using JSON-safe match fields.

job.description: ID of the job the candidate is matched with.

candidate.description: ID of the candidate matched to the job.

owner.description: ID of the owner of the match.

externalId.description: ID of the match in an external system.

isActive.description: Whether the match is still active.

hiredAt.description: Date and time at which the candidate was hired.

submittedAt.description: Date and time at which the candidate was added to the job.

interviewAt.description: Date and time at which the candidate was last interviewed.

offerAt.description: Date and time at which an offer was made to the candidate.

droppedAt.description: Date and time at which the candidate was no longer considered.

customFields.description: Custom field values defined in Manatal.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Manatal match.

actions.name: create_organization
actions.description: Create a Manatal organization using JSON-safe organization fields.

externalId.description: ID of the organization in an external system.

owner.description: ID of the owner of the organization.

customFields.description: Custom field values defined in Manatal.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Manatal organization.

actions.name: get_candidate
actions.description: Retrieve a single Manatal candidate by ID.

candidateId.description: ID of the Manatal candidate to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Identifier for getting a Manatal candidate.

actions.name: get_job
actions.description: Retrieve a single Manatal job by ID.

jobId.description: ID of the Manatal job to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Identifier for getting a Manatal job.

actions.name: get_match
actions.description: Retrieve a single Manatal candidate-job match by ID.

matchId.description: ID of the Manatal match to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Identifier for getting a Manatal match.

actions.name: get_organization
actions.description: Retrieve a single Manatal organization by ID.

organizationId.description: ID of the Manatal organization to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Identifier for getting a Manatal organization.

actions.name: list_candidates
actions.description: List Manatal candidates with pagination and recruitment profile filters.

page.description: Page number to request. Manatal starts pagination at 1.

pageSize.description: Number of records to return per page.

creatorId.description: Return candidates created by this Manatal user ID.

ownerId.description: Return candidates owned by this Manatal user ID.

birthDateGte.description: Return candidates born on or after this date.

birthDateLte.description: Return candidates born on or before this date.

candidateTags.description: Filter candidates by candidate tag IDs or names.

candidateIndustries.description: Filter candidates by candidate industry IDs or names.

createdAtGte.description: Return records created at or after this timestamp.

createdAtLte.description: Return records created at or before this timestamp.

updatedAtGte.description: Return records updated at or after this timestamp.

updatedAtLte.description: Return records updated at or before this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination for listing Manatal candidates.

count.description: Total number of matching records reported by Manatal.

anyOf.description: URL for the next Manatal result page, or null when there is no next page.
URL for the previous Manatal result page, or null when there is no previous page.

actions.name: list_jobs
actions.description: List Manatal jobs with pagination and job status filters.

page.description: Page number to request. Manatal starts pagination at 1.

pageSize.description: Number of records to return per page.

creatorId.description: Return jobs created by this Manatal user ID.

ownerId.description: Return jobs owned by this Manatal user ID.

isPublished.description: Filter jobs by whether they are published.

isRemote.description: Filter jobs by whether they are remote.

openAtGte.description: Return jobs opened at or after this timestamp.

openAtLte.description: Return jobs opened at or before this timestamp.

closeAtGte.description: Return jobs closed at or after this timestamp.

closeAtLte.description: Return jobs closed at or before this timestamp.

createdAtGte.description: Return records created at or after this timestamp.

createdAtLte.description: Return records created at or before this timestamp.

updatedAtGte.description: Return records updated at or after this timestamp.

updatedAtLte.description: Return records updated at or before this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination for listing Manatal jobs.

count.description: Total number of matching records reported by Manatal.

anyOf.description: URL for the next Manatal result page, or null when there is no next page.
URL for the previous Manatal result page, or null when there is no previous page.

actions.name: list_matches
actions.description: List Manatal candidate-job matches with pagination and pipeline filters.

page.description: Page number to request. Manatal starts pagination at 1.

pageSize.description: Number of records to return per page.

ordering.description: Field used to order Manatal match results.

hiredAtGte.description: Return matches hired at or after this timestamp.

hiredAtLte.description: Return matches hired at or before this timestamp.

submittedAtGte.description: Return matches submitted at or after this timestamp.

submittedAtLte.description: Return matches submitted at or before this timestamp.

interviewAtGte.description: Return matches interviewed at or after this timestamp.

interviewAtLte.description: Return matches interviewed at or before this timestamp.

offerAtGte.description: Return matches offered at or after this timestamp.

offerAtLte.description: Return matches offered at or before this timestamp.

droppedAtGte.description: Return matches dropped at or after this timestamp.

droppedAtLte.description: Return matches dropped at or before this timestamp.

createdAtGte.description: Return records created at or after this timestamp.

createdAtLte.description: Return records created at or before this timestamp.

updatedAtGte.description: Return records updated at or after this timestamp.

updatedAtLte.description: Return records updated at or before this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination for listing Manatal matches.

count.description: Total number of matching records reported by Manatal.

anyOf.description: URL for the next Manatal result page, or null when there is no next page.
URL for the previous Manatal result page, or null when there is no previous page.

actions.name: list_organizations
actions.description: List Manatal organizations with pagination and organization filters.

page.description: Page number to request. Manatal starts pagination at 1.

pageSize.description: Number of records to return per page.

creatorId.description: Return organizations created by this Manatal user ID.

ownerId.description: Return organizations owned by this Manatal user ID.

isPublic.description: Filter organizations by whether they are public.

isVisible.description: Filter organizations by whether they are visible.

createdAtGte.description: Return records created at or after this timestamp.

createdAtLte.description: Return records created at or before this timestamp.

updatedAtGte.description: Return records updated at or after this timestamp.

updatedAtLte.description: Return records updated at or before this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination for listing Manatal organizations.

count.description: Total number of matching records reported by Manatal.

anyOf.description: URL for the next Manatal result page, or null when there is no next page.
URL for the previous Manatal result page, or null when there is no previous page.
